page_metadata.biotools__summary: CNN-PepPred is an open-source tool to create convolutional NN models for the discovery of patterns in peptide sets. Application to peptide-MHC class II binding prediction.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CNN-PepPred is an open-source tool to create convolutional NN models for the discovery of patterns in peptide sets. Application to peptide-MHC class II binding prediction.
